cli_install_description: Installs the bundled CLI at {{target}} so you can run `claudette` from any terminal (symlink on macOS/Linux, copy on Windows).
cli_status_installed: ✓ Installed at {{target}} — matches this build of Claudette.
cli_status_stale: ⚠ A different `claudette` is installed at {{target}} (likely from a previous version). Click "Update to current version" to refresh it.
cli_dev_build_warning: Bundled CLI not found next to the GUI binary. This usually means you're running a dev build — `cargo tauri build` (or run `scripts/stage-cli-sidecar.sh` then `cargo tauri build`) ships the sidecar.
general_channel_locked: Locked while an update is installing. Available again after restart.
general_channel_nightly_hint: Nightly builds include the latest features and fixes but may be unstable.
general_archive_on_merge_desc: Automatically archive a workspace when its pull request is merged.
general_system_tray_desc: Show Claudette in the system tray. Closing the window will minimize to tray when enabled.
general_tray_icon_style_desc: Auto uses macOS template tinting (black or white depending on the menu bar) and the logo’s orange on Linux. Pick Light for a white icon on dark panels, Dark for a black icon on light panels, or Color to use the orange on every platform.
general_language_desc: Interface language. Changes take effect immediately.
general_update_check_failed: Update check failed. Please try again later.
attribution: Claudette is not affiliated with Anthropic. Claude® and Claude Code® are trademarks of Anthropic, PBC.
appearance_follow_system_desc: Automatically switch themes based on your OS setting
appearance_show_running_commands_desc: Display a collapsible list of foreground processes running in each workspace's terminals. Off by default.
appearance_interface_font_desc: Font for UI text. Themes may set a default.
appearance_custom_interface_font_desc: Enter a font name installed on your system
appearance_monospace_font_desc: Font for terminal and code blocks.
appearance_custom_monospace_font_desc: Enter a font name installed on your system
models_show_thinking_desc: Display model thinking in chat by default
models_default_plan_mode_desc: Start new chats in plan mode
models_default_fast_mode_desc: Start new chats in fast mode
models_chrome_desc: Allow Claude Code to control your Chrome browser. To use this feature, first install the Claude Code Chrome extension.
models_backends_desc: Configure local and OpenAI-compatible providers for Claude Code. Enable the experimental toggle to use them in chat.
models_backends_disabled: Enable Alternative Claude Code backends in Experimental to use these models in chat.
notifications_sound_source_desc: Choose between system notification sounds or community sound packs.
notifications_no_packs_sub: Browse 100+ community sound packs to customize your notifications.
notifications_active_pack_desc: Choose which installed sound pack to use.
notifications_sound_registry_desc: Install, update, or remove sound packs from the OpenPeon registry.
notifications_volume_desc: Master volume for notification sound playback.
notifications_mute_desc: Silence all notification sounds without changing other settings.
notifications_event_sounds_desc_install: Install a pack to configure event sounds.
notifications_event_sounds_desc_configur: Configure the sound played for each notification event.
notifications_command_desc: Run a shell command when a notification arrives. Workspace environment variables ($CLAUDETTE_WORKSPACE_NAME, $CLAUDETTE_WORKSPACE_PATH, etc.) are set.
notifications_sound_ask_desc: Sound when an agent needs your input
notifications_sound_plan_desc: Sound when an agent has a plan for review
notifications_sound_finished_desc: Sound when an agent finishes its task
notifications_sound_error_desc: Sound when an agent encounters an error
notifications_sound_session_start_desc: Sound when a new session begins
editor_gutter_base_desc: Choose what the editor's git gutter (the colored markers next to line numbers) compares your buffer against.
editor_gutter_base_head_desc: Show only changes you haven't committed yet. Default.
editor_gutter_base_merge_base_desc: Show every change made on this workspace's branch since it diverged from the repository's base branch. Matches the Changes panel.
editor_minimap_desc: Display Monaco's scaled-down overview of the file along the right edge of the editor.
git_branch_prefix_desc: Prefix for new workspace branch names.
git_delete_branch_desc: Delete the local branch when archiving a workspace.
git_delete_warning: The branch will be permanently deleted, including any unmerged commits.
experimental_claudette_terminal_desc: Show a read-only terminal tab that mirrors agent shell commands and background task output. Background task completion handling stays enabled even when this is off.
experimental_plugin_mgmt_desc: Show the Plugins settings section and enable the built-in plugin-management slash commands that open it.
experimental_claude_remote_control_desc: Show the local chat Remote Control toggle and allow Claudette to attach live Claude sessions to claude.ai.
experimental_community_registry_desc: Browse and install community-contributed themes, plugins, and language grammars.
experimental_usage_desc: Show usage data from your Claude Code subscription (session limits, weekly limits, extra usage). Requires a Pro or Max plan with standard login.
experimental_alternative_backends_desc: Expose Ollama, OpenAI-compatible, and custom backends through the Claude Code harness.
plugins_desc: Claudette's built-in plugins — source-control providers and environment activators. Toggle a plugin off to disable it globally; open a row to configure its behaviour.
plugins_desc_note: Not to be confused with Claude Code Plugins, which manages marketplace extensions for the Claude CLI itself.
plugins_none: No plugins discovered. This shouldn't happen — bundled plugins are seeded on first run. Try the Reseed button below.
usage_signing_in_hint: Complete the flow in your browser. This panel will refresh when sign-in finishes.
usage_manual_url: If the browser didn't open, click here
usage_extra_not_enabled_hint: Turn on extra usage to keep using Claude when you hit your limit
usage_no_data: No usage data available yet. Usage appears after your first Claude Code interaction.
repo_branch_from_desc: Each workspace is an isolated copy of your codebase.
repo_remote_origin_desc: Where should we push, pull, and create PRs?
repo_setup_script_hint: Runs automatically when a new workspace is created.
repo_custom_instructions_placeholder: e.g. Always use TypeScript. Prefer functional components.
repo_custom_instructions_hint: Appended to the agent’s system prompt at the start of every chat.
repo_branch_rename_hint: Custom instructions sent to the agent along with your first message in a workspace where the branch hasn’t already been renamed.
repo_branch_rename_placeholder: Add your preferences here. The agent will be told to prioritize these instructions over its default instructions.
repo_mcp_servers_hint: Servers injected into agent sessions. Toggle to enable or disable for this repository.
repo_mcp_no_servers: No MCP servers detected for this repository.
repo_archive_on_merge_desc: Automatically archive workspaces when their PR is merged. Overrides the global setting for this repository.
repo_worktree_discovery_hint: Scan for existing git worktrees (e.g. from Conductor) and import them as workspaces.
repo_script_override_notice: This repo includes a .claudette.json that defines a setup script. Repo-level scripts take precedence over your personal setup script.
repo_instructions_override_notice: This repo includes a .claudette.json that defines custom instructions. Repo-level instructions take precedence over your personal instructions.
repo_autorun_label: Skip confirmation when running setup scripts
repo_archive_script_hint: Runs automatically when a workspace is archived. The workspace filesystem is still accessible.
repo_archive_script_override_notice: A .claudette.json in this repo defines an archive script. Repo-level scripts take precedence over your personal archive script.
repo_archive_autorun_label: Skip confirmation when running archive scripts
pinned_prompts_global_description: Quick-access prompts that appear as pills on the chat composer. Pinned prompts can be slash commands (with or without arguments) or any prompt text. Repository-specific prompts override globals with the same name.
pinned_prompts_repo_description: Pinned prompts only available in this repository. Sharing a name with a global pin replaces it for this repo.
pinned_prompts_empty: No pinned prompts yet. Add one to surface a shortcut on the composer.
pinned_prompts_prompt_placeholder: Prompt or slash command (e.g. /review or 'Run all tests')
pinned_prompts_error_name_unique: Another prompt already uses that name
help_shortcuts_description: Browse every shortcut in a searchable viewer.
help_docs_description: Open the Claudette docs in your browser.
help_issues_description: File a bug or feature request on GitHub.
claude_flags_description: Toggle any flag the installed `claude` CLI supports. These are appended to every agent turn. Flags Claudette manages itself (model, session, output framing) are filtered out.
claude_flags_repo_description: Override global flag settings for this repository.
claude_flags_error_load: Could not load CLI flags from `claude --help`.
claude_flags_danger_warning: Dangerous flag — disables safety checks. Use with care.
claude_flags_tab_badge_tooltip: Dangerously skip permissions is enabled for this workspace
